description: Style NotePerfect for those casual outings, these suede and leather sandals from red tape are all you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort.Product DetailsBrown sandals with brown leather criss-cross straps and a padded ankle strap with a velcro closurePadded footbed with printUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityTextured rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs and curved at the midfootMaterial and CareLeather and suedeWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineUse a suede brush to remove dust from the suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
